name: Care of Cast Iron Cookware
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash in warm, sudsy water. Scrub with scouring pad. Dry thoroughly.
2. Coat the entire surface with vegetable oil. Place in a 300°F oven for one hour, or heat over medium heat until quite hot.
3. Remove and wipe off excess oil with a paper towel.
4. Before each use: Pre-heat for 90 seconds over medium heat.
5. Cleaning and storing: Rinse in hot water after each use. Avoid the dishwasher. Harsh detergents will remove the seasoning. Dry thoroughly. Store in a warm, dry place. Do not stack.
6. After repeated use, your cast ironware will turn black, providing a durable, non-stick surface. If you have any difficulties, re-seasoning is probably required. Simply repeat the above steps to re-season your cast iron product.
